data.title: Pentagon's Pete Hegseth defends Iran war against Congress, says not a quagmire | The Jerusalem Post
data.description: "Don't say: 'I support the troops' on one hand, and then a two-month mission is a quagmire," Hegseth told the congressman during his address.
data.keywords: Iran,iran us news,us iran,US Department of Defense,Pete Hegseth
